rim_no: Customer ID to link the transaction with the customer profile.
card_serno: Serial number of the card used for the transaction.
post_dt: Date the transaction was posted to the account.
txn_dt: Actual transaction date when the swipe/purchase happened.
txn_amt: Amount of the transaction as initiated.
settled_currency: Currency in which the amount was settled by bank (may differ for FX transactions).
reason_code: Code explaining transaction type (purchase, refund, etc.).
credit_debit: Direction of transaction: Credit (refunds, cashbacks) or Debit (purchase, withdrawal).
text_data: Raw transaction string from the network (POS terminal data etc.).
amount: Final amount posted after adjustments (if any).
orig_msg_type: Original message type from ISO 8583 standard (helps identify txn source).
mcc: Merchant Category Code as per ISO standards.
tran_type: Transaction type like POS, Online, ATM, Reversal.
local_intl_flag: Indicates if the transaction is local or international.
online_flag: Whether the transaction was online or offline.
cashback_amt: Cashback amount (if any) credited during the transaction.
i000_msg_type: Full message type from ISO 8583 standard.
rewards_flag: If the transaction is eligible for reward points.
textdescription: Cleaned and formatted description for app display.
retail_flag: Whether the transaction is from a retail category.
